source.note: SHA-256 guest APC (standalone stress case); byte-identical to powdr's autoprecompiles/tests/sha256_apc_pre_opt.json.gz (md5 96399bca0f336fd1462d4e8c40176ead). The single largest autoprecompile by variable count from powdr's OpenVM SHA-256 guest benchmark: ~170k variables / ~200k constraints / ~84k bus interactions.
source.powdr_opt_stage: generated as ApcWithBusMap gzipped JSON by running powdr's native optimize() (the autoprecompiles/tests/optimizer.rs::test_sha256 configuration: default_openvm_bus_map, DEFAULT_DEGREE_BOUND); counts match that test's snapshot
